Properties.AlarmDescription: Alert when callback Lambda has errors
Alert when callback Lambda is throttled
Alert when callback Lambda p99 duration exceeds 24000ms (~80% of timeout)

CallbackLambdaArn.Description: ARN of the callback Lambda function

DefaultCallbackTableName.Description: Name of the default callback table

CallbackApiUrl.Description: URL of the dedicated callback API

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
